mapper.sql: app_id, status, apply_time, app_user, approve_text, approve_time, apply_text, model_count, model_qty, approve_user, calc_id, warehouse_code, stock_type, customer_no, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, property_id, eAmount
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.bin_order_app
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.bin_order_app (app_id, status, apply_time, app_user, approve_text, approve_time, apply_text, model_count, model_qty, approve_user, calc_id, warehouse_code, stock_type, customer_no, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, property_id, eAmount) values (#{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{appUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approveText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{applyText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modelCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{approveUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calcId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{eamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

update dbo.bin_order_app
app_id = #{record.appId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
apply_time = #{record.applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
app_user = #{record.appUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
approve_text = #{record.approveText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
approve_time = #{record.approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
apply_text = #{record.applyText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
model_count = #{record.modelCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_qty = #{record.modelQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
approve_user = #{record.approveUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
calc_id = #{record.calcId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
property_id = #{record.propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
eAmount = #{record.eamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update dbo.bin_order_app
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
apply_time = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
app_user = #{appUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
approve_text = #{approveText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
approve_time = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
apply_text = #{applyText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
model_count = #{modelCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_qty = #{modelQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
approve_user = #{approveUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
calc_id = #{calcId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_type = #{stockType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
property_id = #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
eAmount = #{eamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
